expectations.text: Subject line starts with 'feat:' in lowercase
expectations.evidence: Subject is 'feat: implement core/errors submodule' — starts with 'feat:' lowercase

expectations.text: Subject line uses imperative present tense (e.g. 'implement' or 'add', not 'implemented' or 'added')
Subject line is 70 characters or fewer
Body mentions at least one public symbol (M3LError, M3LResult, M3LErrorUtils, or similar)
expectations.evidence: Body names M3LError, M3LResult<T,E>, and M3LErrorUtils explicitly

expectations.text: Body includes a semver impact statement (e.g. 'exports map unchanged' or 'no semver break')
expectations.evidence: Body contains verbatim standard phrase: 'three-entry exports map unchanged (no semver break).'

expectations.text: Body includes a Co-Authored-By footer with noreply@anthropic.com
